identity_resolvers.description: Use your Steam username (recommended for Steam Deck)

cli_commands.description: Print information about the RetroDECK configuration file and its contents
Compresses target file to a compatible format
Compresses all supported games into a compatible format
Reconfigure broken folder locations in RetroDECK without a full reset
Reset one or more component/emulator configurations to default values.
Factory Reset, triggers the initial setup.
Test upgrading RetroDECK to a specific version, developer use only
Show the current status of a preset. Use --get-help for more information
Configure or toggle a preset. Use --set-help for more information
Open a specific component or emulator. Use --open --list for available components

welcome.name: About Retrodeck
welcome.description: View patch notes, credits, and other project information.

welcome.name: Data Management
welcome.description: Move, clean empty or rebuild RetroDECK directories.

welcome.name: Open Component
welcome.description: Manually launch and configure individual components. Advanced Users Only.

welcome.name: Reset Components
welcome.description: Reset a specific component or restore all RetroDECK defaults.

welcome.name: Settings
welcome.description: Adjust core RetroDECK: Presets, Visuals, Tweaks and Logins.

welcome.name: Tools
welcome.description: Run various tools: BIOS Checker, File Compressor, Install optional features and more.

settings.name: RetroDECK Folder Iconset
settings.description: Enable or disable: RetroDECK folder iconset.

settings.name: Process RetroENGINE event scripts
settings.description: Enable or disable: RetroENGINE event script processing

tools.name: BIOS Checker
tools.description: Checks BIOS and firmware availability and displays key details.

tools.name: Change Logging Level
tools.description: Adjust RetroDECK logging level for debugging purposes.

tools.name: Games Compressor
tools.description: Compresses games into various formats for supported systems.

tools.name: M3U Multi-File Validator
tools.description: Validates the structure of multi-file or multi-disc games.

tools.name: Repair RetroDECK Paths
tools.description: Fix RetroDECK folder paths for missing or misconfigured directories.

tools.name: Update Notification
tools.description: Enable or disable: notifications for new RetroDECK versions.

tools.name: Tool: USB Import
tools.description: Import or export RetroDECK data using a USB storage device.

data_management.name: Backup RetroDECK
data_management.description: Backup and compress RetroDECK userdata into a .tar file.

data_management.name: ROMs Folder: Clean Empty Systems
data_management.description: Remove empty system folders from the roms directory.

data_management.name: Move: All of RetroDECK or specific paths
data_management.description: Move the entire RetroDECK data folder or individual subfolders to a new location.

about_retrodeck.name: RetroDECK: Version History
about_retrodeck.description: View the changelog and version history of RetroDECK.

developer_options.name: Browse the RetroDECK Wiki
developer_options.description: Access and browse the RetroDECK wiki online for guides, tips, and documentation.

developer_options.name: RetroDECK: Install Specific Release
developer_options.description: Install a specific cooker release or the latest main version of RetroDECK.

ask_to_exit.name: Ask-To-Exit
ask_to_exit.desc: Enable or disable: Show a confirmation pop-up when exiting a game (for certain components).

borders.name: Borders
borders.desc: Enable or disable: Borders/Bezels in supported components.

discord_rich_presence.name: Discord Rich Presence
discord_rich_presence.desc: Enable or disable: Discord Rich Presence in supported components.

cheevos.name: RetroAchievements
cheevos.desc: Logging in/out of RetroAchievements in supported components.

cheevos_hardcore.name: RetroAchievements: Hardcore Mode
cheevos_hardcore.desc: Enable or disable: Hardcore mode for RetroAchievements (no cheats, rewind, or save states) in supported components.

quick_resume.name: Quick Resume
quick_resume.desc: Enable or disable: Automatic save/load of game states in supported components.

rewind.name: Rewind
rewind.desc: Enable or disable: Rewind functionality in supported components.

savestate_auto_load.name: Savestate Auto Load
savestate_auto_load.desc: Enable or disable: Automatic load of the last saved state in supported components.

savestate_on_exit.name: Savestate on Exit
savestate_on_exit.desc: Enable or disable: Automatic save on exit in supported components.

abxy_button_swap.name: Swap A/B and X/Y Buttons
abxy_button_swap.desc: Enable or disable: Swapped A/B and X/Y button layout in supported components.

universal_dyn_input.name: Universal Dynamic Input Textures
universal_dyn_input.desc: Enable or disable: Universal Dynamic Input Textures in supported components.

widescreen.name: Widescreen
widescreen.desc: Enable or disable: Widescreen mode in supported components.
